subject: Geography
title: Papua New Guinea's Hidden Peaks
description: A micro-lesson that makes Papua New Guinea's Hidden Peaks usable.

hook.text: Papua New Guinea has mountains over 4,500 meters that most of the world has never heard of.

buildup.text: Dense jungle and extreme terrain kept these highlands isolated for millennia.

discovery.text: In the 1930s, explorers found a million people living in valleys no outsider had visited.

twist.text: Over 800 languages are spoken here—the most linguistically diverse place on Earth.

climax.text: Mountains created so many isolated valleys that each developed its own language.

quiz.question: Why is Papua New Guinea so linguistically diverse?
options: Mountains isolated communities in separate valleys
It was a major trade hub
